description: Configure the Vtiger CRM Inventory settings for a Canadian expansion. Add 'GST' (5%) and 'PST' (7%) to the Product & Service Taxes and 'Shipping GST' (5%) to the Shipping & Handling Taxes. Update the global Terms and Conditions text to: 'All sales are final. International shipments may be subject to customs duties and delays. Payment is due within 30 days.'

metadata.expected_tandc_substring: international shipments may be subject to customs duties and delays
